title: Optimizer loses part of range when OR multiple identical ranges in range plan
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_or_extended (a bigint NOT NULL, b bigint NOT NULL, c bigint NOT NULL, d VARCHAR(10), e DECIMAL(10,2), PRIMARY KEY (a, b, c));
SELECT * FROM test_or_extended WHERE (a=1 AND b=1 AND c=1) OR (a=1 AND b=1 AND c=1) OR (a=2 AND b=2 AND c=2);
SELECT * FROM test_or_extended WHERE (a=1 AND b=1 AND c=1) OR (a=1 AND b=2 AND c=2) OR (a IS NULL AND b=3 AND c=3);
SELECT * FROM test_or_extended WHERE (a=1 AND b=1 AND c=1) OR (a=1 AND b=1 AND c=1) OR (a=3 AND b=3 AND c=3) OR (a=2 AND b=2 AND c IS NULL);
key_bug_features: Optimizer loses range with multiple identical OR conditions
